title: Automatic Announcement Display Added
body: Unread announcements will now be displayed automatically when the app starts.

title: Version Information Added
body: You can now check the app version details in the side menu.

title: Enhanced Announcement Features
body: Added a new indicator on the home screen so you never miss an update.

title: Important Update Notice
body: Fixed the issue where the app would crash.

title: Latest Update Notice
body: Added a new User Guide to help you get started.

title: Announcements Feature Added
body: You can now check the latest news and updates directly from the app.
